name: jprofiler
description: Java profiling with AI agent integration. Profile CPU, memory, JDBC, HTTP and more.

interface.longDescription: Profile CPU hotspots, memory allocations, JDBC queries, HTTP calls and more directly from Codex.
defaultPrompt: Use JProfiler to analyze CPU hotspots in this application.
Use JProfiler to investigate memory allocations and heap usage.
Use JProfiler to analyze a JFR recording.
Use JProfiler to analyze an HPROF heap dump.
Use JProfiler to analyze a JProfiler snapshot.
